## What this changes

A sentence or two. If it's a correction, name what was wrong. If it's an addition, name the failure mode it prevents.

## Where it lives

- [ ] `vibe_coding_cheat_sheet.md`
- [ ] `HITCHHIKERS_GUIDE_TO_VIBE_CODING.md`
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Other (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

## What you've actually run into

Optional but valued. The repo collects things learned the hard way — a one-line note on the project, tool, or model version that surfaced this is worth more than a paragraph of justification.

## Checklist

- [ ] I'm submitting this under the [MIT License](../LICENSE)
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The change keeps the existing voice (dry, opinionated, not breathless)

Don't panic.
